prestazioni: Engine: 6.0L W12 twin-turbo (engine code: **L410E**) – Full forged internals upgrade with **Manley Performance** 4340 steel connecting rods, **JE Pistons** 9.0:1 compression forged pistons, and **ARP Custom Age 625+** head studs for 18 psi boost capability with **Garrett GTX5533R** billet turbos (hybrid core, 76mm compressor, 88mm turbine) on **Tial MV-R 60mm** wastegates and **Tial 50mm** blow-off valves. Custom **ECUtek RaceROM** calibration with **Motec M150** standalone backup for flex-fuel E85 tuning and launch control.

Drivetrain: **Quaife ATB LSD** (QDF15H) for the ZF 6HP28A transmission with **Peloquin 2.5-way clutch-type differential**, paired with **South Bend Clutch** twin-disc ceramic clutch (stage 3+) and **Fidanza** aluminum flywheel. **034Motorsport** transmission mount insert and **Vibra-Technics** engine mounts to reduce drivetrain slop under 1,200+ lb-ft torque.

Suspension & Braking: **KW Suspensions** Clubsport coilovers (3-way adjustable, 80mm ride height drop) with **H&R** 25mm front / 20mm rear sway bars and **SuperPro** poly bushings (part #SPF9071K). **AP Racing** 6-piston front / 4-piston rear big brake kit (405mm rotors, **Ferodo DS3000** pads) with **Goodridge** braided stainless steel lines and **Motul RBF 660** brake fluid.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny** widebody conversion kit (Pandem Continental GT SC-specific, 50mm front / 70mm rear fender flares) with **Varis** carbon fiber front splitter, **Seibon** carbon fiber hood (OEM-style with functional vents), and **Aeromotions** active rear wing (dual-element, 3-position adjustable).

**Rotiform** LAS-R 21x10.5 ET25 (front) / 21x12.5 ET45 (rear) forged wheels with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2** tires (285/30/21 front, 325/25/21 rear). **Air Lift Performance** 3P management with **AccuAir** ENDO VT ECU for on-the-fly ride height adjustment and **Bags Over Bags** custom reinforced mounts.

**Vorsteiner** carbon fiber mirror caps, **Novitec** carbon fiber side skirts, and **LuxuryTec** LED headlight upgrade (OEM+ adaptive bi-xenon projectors with **Morimoto** HID bulbs). **Valentine Research** V1 Gen2 radar detector hardwired into the **Bentley** infotainment system with **Escort** laser shifters integrated into the front bumper.
